artifacts.summary: Partial implementation of coverage-based approach: CanonicalR_chain definitions created, but coverage theorem blocked by deeper termination issue
New module with CanonicalR_chain and CanonicalR_reachable definitions for tracking reachability from root

partial_progress.details: Created DovetailedCoverageReach.lean with chain definitions. Coverage theorem and forward_F_via_coverage blocked by termination issue that is deeper than research report anticipated.

metadata.blocking_issue: The density argument can arbitrarily increase formula depth. The claim that 'all subsequent calls are large steps after the first' requires proving that list growth is dense (points.length >= f(stage)), which is not currently provable. The recursion terminates mathematically but lacks a simple well-founded Lean formalization.
metadata.review_reason: Coverage approach blocked. Options: (A) Accept localized sorries at lines 806/959/1028, (B) Prove build growth invariant, (C) Complex well-founded recursion
